name: Vacation Leave
description: For rest, recreation, and personal business. Must be filed at least 3 days in advance.

name: Sick Leave
description: For illness, injury, or medical appointments. Medical certificate required for 3+ consecutive days.

name: Service Incentive Leave
description: Mandated by the Labor Code (Art. 95). Convertible to cash if unused at year-end.

name: Maternity Leave
description: Per RA 11210 (105-Day Expanded Maternity Leave). Applicable to female employees.

name: Paternity Leave
description: Per RA 8187. For married male employees, first 4 deliveries.

name: Solo Parent Leave
description: Per RA 8972. Must present Solo Parent ID.

name: Emergency Leave
description: For urgent personal or family emergencies. Without pay. Supporting documents required.
